original: This is a light gray medipen with an unusual teardrop-like shape. Very popular among fans of fantasy fiction, it’s a targeted transformative which causes the user’s ears to become pointed like those of a fantasy elf. Repeated doses will cause the ears to lengthen outward. Users with particularly long ears often experience them becoming an erogenous zone. Unlike most medipens, there is an adjustable dial which, when spun, causes the surface of the medipen to cycle between several different color schemes. The labeling notes that each of these flavors will adjust the type of fantasy creature that the Sylvanol will transform you towards. A small pamphlet included with the medipen details the various settings.
You take a look at the dial on the medipen and compare with the small instruction pamphlet. It looks like there’s six different settings available:
{var0}+{var1}+" injects the Sylvanol to no effect.
context: <<POS:09809434>> <<VARS:var0=e.capitalA,var1=e.short>> output(e.capitalA+e.short+" injects the Sylvanol to no effect.")

original: You put the medipen back into your inventory.
the sides of your head and changing shape to a form very much like a human’s save for the pointed tips. You have elven ears!

This isn’t your first time having this kind of ears, and they seem to have remembered the experience, coming out at the "+{var0}+" inches they used to be instead of the standard short ears for a first-time user. Nice.
context: <<POS:09810373>> <<VARS:var0=e.earLength>> output("\n\n This isn’t your first time having this kind of ears, and they seem to have remembered the experience, coming out at the "+e.earLength+" inches they used to be instead of the standard short ears for a first-time user. Nice.")

original: While formerly your ears could have been mistaken for a human’s at a glance, that soon fades as they stretch outward, gaining a much more visibly triangular shape that’s distinctively elven and much more sensitive to the air when it blows across them. You now have one-inch elf ears!
You shudder in pleasure as the Sylvanol works over your ears, making them stretch out another "+{var1}.numToText({var0})+" inches before they stop growing, tingling with delicious new sensitivity.
context: <<POS:09811143>> <<VARS:var0=t,var1=l.m>> output("\n\nYou shudder in pleasure as the Sylvanol works over your ears, making them stretch out another "+l.m.numToText(t)+" inches before they stop growing, tingling with delicious new sensitivity.")

original: You have a feeling they won’t be able to grow much more than this, though.
A sparkling flash of "+{var0}+" fills your vision, leaving you briefly stunned. When you recover and check your vision, you discover that your eyes have shed their old hue in favor of "+{var1}+".
context: <<POS:09811598>> <<VARS:var0=e.eyeColor,var1=t>> output("\n\nA sparkling flash of "+e.eyeColor+" fills your vision, leaving you briefly stunned. When you recover and check your vision, you discover that your eyes have shed their old hue in favor of "+t+".")

original: A liquid feeling flows down your hair from the roots as if someone had poured a bucket of water over your head. You’re able to catch the trail end of the transformation that goes with this sensation, the last vestiges of "+{var0}+" disappearing from your hair in favor of a new lovely "+{var1}+" shade.

You’re able to catch the trail end of the transformation that goes with this sensation, the last vestiges of "+e.hairColor+" disappearing from your hair in favor of a new lovely "+t+" shade.")

original: A delicious tingle washes across your whole body, a splotch of "+{var0}+" forming at the center of your chest before sweeping all across your body, replacing your old skin color entirely

original: being swept over by the Sylvanol, fixing every blemish and smoothing out every wrinkle beyond what’s even natural. By the time it’s done, you’re left with flawless smooth skin.

There’s a budding sensation at your back, an odd pressure that soon leads you to gasp at the sensation of something along your back splitting open like a cocoon to allow a quartet of light blue wings to unfold. Each is a magnificent gossamer beauty, together forming a set of radiant butterfly-like wings. You now have fairy wings!

Your [creature.wings] feel strange, and you look behind you to see them melting into a new, delicate-looking form. By the time they finish transforming they’ve become a quartet of light blue gossamer wings, together forming a set of radiant butterfly-like wings. You now have fairy wings!

There’s a budding sensation at your back, an odd pressure that soon leads you to gasp at the sensation of something along your back splitting open like a cocoon to allow a quartet of glittering black wings to unfold. Each is a magnificent gossamer beauty, together forming a set of butterfly-like wings coated in what looks like wisps of shadow. You now have shadowy fairy wings!

Your [creature.wings] feel strange, and you look behind you to see them melting into a new, delicate-looking form. By the time they finish transforming they’ve become a quartet of glittering black gossamer wings, together forming a set of butterfly-like wings coated in what looks like wisps of shadow. You now have shadowy fairy wings!
You feel a tingle like the medipen is going to change your skin, but suddenly it concentrates into just a few places
. You watch in amazement as ".concat(t," markings begin to flow")
, forming a new pattern and reshaping them into
against the ".concat(e.skinAccent," accents, forming a new pattern and reshaping them into")
across your [creature.skinFurScalesNoun] like a liquid paint, covering every inch of your body in the
intricate tattoos. The lines stand out clear as day thanks to their glow, forming a beautiful contrast with your [creature.skinFurScales]. You now have ".concat(t," body markings!")

You feel an odd tingle in your hair, feeling as if it’s being blown about by an invisible wind and slowly dissolving. At first you think you’re going bald, but inspection reveals that your hair has instead been replaced by an aerogel-like material, retaining its former color but with a translucent, gaseous appearance and practically no weight to it at all. You have ethereal hair!
You apply the medipen to the base of your neck, as instructed, and feel the Sylvanol Au Ronce’s payload get to work.
Despite applying the medipen correctly, nothing happens aside from a brief tingle in your ears. It must have been a dud.
